$comment: Skeleton package.json for the L12 Discoverability runner. Copy into packages/discoverability/ (or wherever you host the CLI) and implement src/cli.ts to match the contract in README.md.
name: @yourorg/discoverability
description: L12 Discoverability runner — SEO + AEO + GEO + ASO audit / gate / report CLI

comments._dependencies_note: yaml + zod parse/validate discoverability.config.yaml. execa wraps Lighthouse / vendor scripts. fast-xml-parser handles sitemap.xml + RSS. undici is the modern fetch for sitemap/canonical/robots probing.
comments._devDeps_note: lighthouse + @lhci/cli are spawned by execa, not imported directly. linkinator is used by web-seo runner for URL reachability sweeps across sitemap.xml.
comments._python_note: If you wire in the geo-seo-claude vendor adapter (AEO citability/llms.txt), Python 3.12+ deps live alongside in tools/vendor/geo-seo-claude/requirements.txt — install separately in CI.
comments._ruby_note: If you use fastlane for ASO metadata sync, Ruby + fastlane are managed by a separate Gemfile.
